messages.author: IanT [IT-Orp-S omni]
messages.text: I'm trying to use Meshcore.js in NodeJS to login to my repeater and read its stats/telemetry data. When I try the examples, they all seem to fail, with the same error. Just once did it work, so I'm wondering if there's some change in timeout or response in later repeater firmwares than this version of meshcore.js obtained through NPM.
messages.content_html: I'm trying to use Meshcore.js in NodeJS to login to my repeater and read its stats/telemetry data. When I try the examples, they all seem to fail, with the same error. Just once did it work, so I'm wondering if there's some change in timeout or response in later repeater firmwares than this version of meshcore.js obtained through NPM.

messages.author: IanT [IT-Orp-S omni]
messages.text: Aha, I've fixed it - seems to have been a timeout in connection.js: getTelemetry(contactPublicKey, extraTimeoutMillis = 3000) { return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => { try { // get public key prefix we expect in the telemetry response const publicKeyPrefix = contactPublicKey.subarray(0, 6); ... I changed the timeout from 1000ms to 3000ms and it always works now.
messages.content_html: Aha, I've fixed it - seems to have been a timeout in connection.js: getTelemetry(contactPublicKey, extraTimeoutMillis = 3000) { return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => { try { // get public key prefix we expect in the telemetry response const publicKeyPrefix = contactPublicKey.subarray(0, 6); ... I changed the timeout from 1000ms to 3000ms and it always works now.
